name: Poké Ball
description: A device for catching wild Pokémon

name: Great Ball
description: A good, high-performance Ball that provides a higher catch rate than a standard Poké Ball

name: Ultra Ball
description: An ultra-performance Ball that provides a higher catch rate than a Great Ball

name: Repeat Ball
description: A Ball that works especially well on Pokémon species that were previously caught

name: Safari Ball
description: A special Ball that can only be used in the Safari Zone

name: Net Ball
description: A Ball that works especially well on Water- and Bug-type Pokémon

name: Nest Ball
description: A Ball that works especiall well on Pokémon under level 31

name: Timer Ball
description: A somewhat different Ball that becomes progressively the more turns there are in battle

name: Luxury Ball
description: A comfortable Poké Ball that makes the Pokémon happy

name: Dive Ball
description: A Ball that works especially well on Pokémon encountered while Surfing, Diving or Fishing

name: Dusk Ball
description: A Ball that works especially well if used in a cave or at night

name: Heal Ball
description: A remedial Poké Ball that restores the caught Pokémon's HP and eliminates any status problems

name: Quick Ball
description: A Ball that provides better catch rate if it is used at the start of the wild encounter

name: Premier Ball
description: A rare Poké Ball that has been specially made to commemorate a special occasion
